idea-plugin.name: FTC Companion Improved
idea-plugin.description:
FTC Companion Improved

An IntelliJ and Android Studio plugin for FIRST Tech Challenge (FTC) development, originally based on the FTC companion plugin by First Slovenia.

Features:

  • Quick OpMode Creation - Built-in templates for TeleOp, Autonomous, SolversAuto, and SolversTeleOp
  • Custom Templates – Create and use your own .ft template files for team-specific boilerplate code
  • Robot Controller Console - Built-in browser access to Control Hub, RC Phone, USB, or custom IP dashboards
  • Multiple Dashboards – Access Homescreen, Panels Dashboard, and FTC Dashboard from within your IDE

Supports vanilla FTC SDK, SolversLib, and PedroPathing projects.

Documentation & Source
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.4.0

  • NEW: Custom Templates – Create your own .ft template files and use them in the IDE
  • NEW: Custom IP Option – Configure and use custom robot IP addresses in the RC Console
  • Organized built-in templates into a dedicated submenu
  • Added a settings page for plugin configuration (Tools → FTC Companion)
  • Fixed Java 17 compatibility issues

See Custom Templates Guide for usage instructions.

action.description: Creates a new TeleOp OpMode class
Creates a new Autonomous OpMode class
Creates a new SolversAuto OpMode class
Creates a new SolversTeleOp OpMode class

group.description: Custom OpMode templates from configured directory
